market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to extreme negative GEX (-5.28B total). Dealers short gamma will amplify all movements. Bearish smirk skew (1.28-1.42) confirms puts are heavily bid.
outlook.summary: Market is in a precarious short-gamma regime with extreme put skew and elevated PCR (4.09 MONTHLY). All three expirations show negative GEX, creating a volatile environment where dealer hedging amplifies price swings. Spot at 655.83 is being pulled toward WEEKLY max pain at 656. The 630 strike is a massive structural support with 129K+ OI across WEEKLY+MONTHLY. Watch for pinning behavior at 656 intraday, with 630 as the critical floor. CALL walls at 665-670 provide overhead resistance.

levels.motivazione: Massive PUT OI confluence: 129K WEEKLY + 132K MONTHLY. Primary structural support. Skew ratio 1.40+ confirms heavy put demand at this level.
WEEKLY max pain at spot. High volume on 655 CALL (63K) and PUT (45K). Primary pinning target for day session.
0DTE max pain. Strong PUT OI (27K 0DTE, 76K MONTHLY). Secondary magnet below spot. Near-term support.
Dominant CALL OI: 20K MONTHLY + 6K WEEKLY. Key resistance above spot. Negative GEX amplifies rejection strength.
Significant PUT OI: 29K 0DTE, 23K WEEKLY, 100K MONTHLY. Intermediate support layer above 630.
MONTHLY max pain with 9.3K CALL OI. Upper bound of resistance cluster 665-670.
Secondary PUT wall: 35K 0DTE, 13K WEEKLY, 117K MONTHLY. Backup support if 630 fails.

outlook.summary: Price pinned between RESONANCE levels at 580 (support) and 590 (resistance). Max Pain progression (580→585→590) creates upward magnetic drift. Elevated PCR (1.84) with negative Monthly GEX creates asymmetric risk: downside moves amplified, upside capped by Call walls.

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE PUT OI (12,516), 0DTE Max Pain, significant OI across all expiries. Primary dealer hedge zone with massive volume (57,538).

Highest 0DTE CALL OI (7,904), strong Weekly CALL presence (7,467). Primary upside resistance with dealer short gamma above.
Highest Monthly PUT OI (40,311), strong 0DTE presence (10,417). Deep structural support with bearish skew reinforcement.
Massive Monthly OI battle: PUT 38,747 vs CALL 37,024. Psychological resistance with dealer pinning risk.
Extreme 0DTE volume spike (40,788) with minimal OI (1,517). Intraday gamma warfare zone, rapid delta hedging expected.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate; positive total GEX suppresses volatility with spot pinned near max pain
outlook.summary: Market positioned in positive gamma territory across short-term expiries. Spot (24129.75) magnetized to monthly max pain at 24100. Bearish smirk skew (1.32-1.33) indicates underlying hedging demand despite stable GEX. Key support at 24000 resonance, resistance cascade 24300-24700-25000.

levels.motivazione: Monthly Max Pain ~0.1% from spot. High call OI (245) creates dealer delta hedging flows. Primary price attraction point with strongest magnetic effect.
Multi-expiry PUT dominance: Monthly 535 OI (highest), 0DTE 122 OI + Max Pain. Dealer gamma support with triple-timeframe confluence.
Significant CALL OI across all expiries (167+106+67). Major psychological resistance with round-number effect and multi-timeframe dealer hedging.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (188) above spot. Primary intraday resistance with concentrated dealer short gamma exposure.
Strong WEEKLY (202) and MONTHLY (411) CALL OI. Secondary resistance with weekly/monthly dealer interest alignment.
WEEKLY+MONTHLY significance with unusual 0DTE volume spike (204 vol vs 49 OI). Mixed PUT/CALL creates dealer friction zone.
Major MONTHLY PUT WALL (266 OI). Secondary structural support validated by bearish skew sentiment (1.33 ratio).
